'''fokayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:weaponisable|weaponisable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weaponisable|weaponisable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fokayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokayithi|fokayithi]] || [[word:fokayiji|fokayiji]] || [[word:fokayishi|fokayishi]] || [[word:fokayiki|fokayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokayuthuthu|fokayuthuthu]] || [[word:fokayujuju|fokayujuju]] || [[word:fokayushushu|fokayushushu]] || [[word:fokayukuku|fokayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokayuthu|fokayuthu]] || [[word:fokayuju|fokayuju]] || [[word:fokayushu|fokayushu]] || [[word:fokayuku|fokayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokayufthuf|fokayufthuf]] || [[word:fokayufjuf|fokayufjuf]] || [[word:fokayufshuf|fokayufshuf]] || [[word:fokayufkuf|fokayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokayethe|fokayethe]] || [[word:fokayeje|fokayeje]] || [[word:fokayeshe|fokayeshe]] || [[word:fokayeke|fokayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokayothotho|fokayothotho]] || [[word:fokayojojo|fokayojojo]] || [[word:fokayoshosho|fokayoshosho]] || [[word:fokayokoko|fokayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokayotho|fokayotho]] || [[word:fokayojo|fokayojo]] || [[word:fokayosho|fokayosho]] || [[word:fokayoko|fokayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokayofthof|fokayofthof]] || [[word:fokayofjof|fokayofjof]] || [[word:fokayofshof|fokayofshof]] || [[word:fokayofkof|fokayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfthÃŸf|fokayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfjÃŸf|fokayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfshÃŸf|fokayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfkÃŸf|fokayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fokayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fokayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fokayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fokayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfthÃŸf|fokayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfjÃŸf|fokayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfshÃŸf|fokayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfkÃŸf|fokayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfthÃŸf|fokayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfjÃŸf|fokayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfshÃŸf|fokayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fokayÃŸfkÃŸf|fokayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokayÃḊthÃḊ|fokayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fokayÃḊjÃḊ|fokayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fokayÃḊshÃḊ|fokayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fokayÃḊkÃḊ|fokayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokayathatha|fokayathatha]] || [[word:fokayajaja|fokayajaja]] || [[word:fokayashasha|fokayashasha]] || [[word:fokayakaka|fokayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokayatha|fokayatha]] || [[word:fokayaja|fokayaja]] || [[word:fokayasha|fokayasha]] || [[word:fokayaka|fokayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokayafthaf|fokayafthaf]] || [[word:fokayafjaf|fokayafjaf]] || [[word:fokayafshaf|fokayafshaf]] || [[word:fokayafkaf|fokayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fokayasha|fokayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokayshÃḋsha|fokayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokayrosha|fokayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokaymusha|fokaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokayasha|fokayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokaynkshÃḋsha|gofokaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokaynkrosha|gofokaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokaynkmusha|gofokaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokaynkyasha|gofokaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fokakayasha|fokakayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokakayshÃḋsha|fokakayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokakayrosha|fokakayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokakaymusha|fokakaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokakayasha|fokakayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokakaynkshÃḋsha|gofokakaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokakaynkrosha|gofokakaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokakaynkmusha|gofokakaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokakaynkyasha|gofokakaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fekÃḊyasha|fekÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fekÃḊyshÃḋsha|fekÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fekÃḊyrosha|fekÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fekÃḊymusha|fekÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fekÃḊyasha|fekÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofekÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gofekÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofekÃḊynkrosha|gofekÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofekÃḊynkmusha|gofekÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofekÃḊynkyasha|gofekÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fokfayasha|fokfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokfayshÃḋsha|fokfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokfayrosha|fokfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokfaymusha|fokfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokfayasha|fokfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokfaynkshÃḋsha|gofokfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokfaynkrosha|gofokfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokfaynkmusha|gofokfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokfaynkyasha|gofokfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
